meaning: 布拉瓦茨基夫人(即Blavatsky,Helena Petrovna)
examples: Madame Blavatsky wrote a pamphlet against phallicism.
As a Theosophist, Blavatsky promoted pantheism and greatly influenced both Mahatma Gandhi and Annie Besant.
The term theosophy (in its Greek and other forms) had been used about 100 or so times over two millennia in western civilization before Madame Blavatsky.
